use clap::Parser;
use std::collections::HashSet;

fn known_rules() -> HashSet<&'static str> {
    ["no-unwrap", "no-panic", "max-lines", "no-unsafe"]
        .into_iter()
        .collect()
}

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long)]
    rules: Vec<String>,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) -> Result<(), String> {
    let catalog = known_rules();
    for rule_id in &cli.rules {
        if !catalog.contains(rule_id.as_str()) {
            return Err(format!("unknown rule '{rule_id}'; available: {:?}", catalog));
        }
    }
    for rule_id in &cli.rules {
        apply_rule(rule_id);
    }
    Ok(())
}

fn apply_rule(rule_id: &str) {
    println!("applying rule: {rule_id}");
}
